context: Tests whether the agent uses Method A (agent-browser) for extraction given it is available, handles SPA rendering with scroll-and-wait steps, saves all output under the correct ${ARTIFACTS}/ path, and captures both CSS vars and computed element styles.

checklist.name: Uses agent-browser
checklist.description: extract.sh uses agent-browser commands (not curl or wget as the primary extraction method), since agent-browser was stated to be available

checklist.name: ARTIFACTS path defined
checklist.description: extract.sh defines ARTIFACTS as a variable pointing to .context/artifacts/app-client-brand-io/2026-03-13

checklist.name: mkdir -p ARTIFACTS
checklist.description: extract.sh creates the ARTIFACTS directory with mkdir -p before writing any files

checklist.name: SPA scroll step
checklist.description: extract.sh includes a window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight) eval or equivalent scroll step before extracting tokens

checklist.name: Wait networkidle after scroll
checklist.description: extract.sh waits for networkidle (agent-browser wait --load networkidle or equivalent) after the scroll step

checklist.name: CSS vars extraction
checklist.description: extract.sh includes a JS eval that extracts CSS custom properties from :root (filtering for -- prefixed properties) and saves to a JSON file under ARTIFACTS

checklist.name: Computed styles extraction
checklist.description: extract.sh includes a JS eval that extracts computed styles from key elements (at minimum: body, buttons/CTAs) and saves to a JSON file under ARTIFACTS

checklist.name: Screenshots under ARTIFACTS
checklist.description: All screenshot commands in extract.sh save files to ${ARTIFACTS}/ paths — not to /tmp or docs/

checklist.name: wait --load networkidle on open
checklist.description: extract.sh waits for the page to fully load after opening (agent-browser wait --load networkidle) before attempting any extraction

checklist.name: Full-page and mobile screenshots
checklist.description: extract.sh takes at least one full-page screenshot and one mobile-viewport screenshot (375px wide)
